title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like something out of a picture book....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll admit, you put on quite the show...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But still, you're at the end of your rope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Okay, you're right... I'm about to croak.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is taking a lot out of me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can rest easy and die then. Tales will be told about how you all fought this war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PANT... PANT... WHEN YOU'RE DEAD, ONLY YOUR BONES STICK AROUND. SHISH!!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
